title: Datagrid columns display undefined values
symptom: The datagrid columns do not show the bound data and instead display 'undefined' at page load. Clicking on the columns results in nulls or placeholders being shown.
applies_when: Using custom variables from an array
Datagrid is set up but not displaying data
not_this_if: Data is correctly displayed when using a collection
root_cause: The issue arises when the datagrid is not properly configured with a defined path for the data source. Without a correct path, the datagrid cannot retrieve and display the intended data from the provided array.
fix_steps: Open the settings of your datagrid
Define the correct path for the data source
Save the changes and refresh the page
agent_instruction: Ensure the datagrid has a defined path in its settings to display data correctly.
